infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Agri-Connect uses your camera to photograph crop leaves for disease detection.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Agri-Connect accesses your photo library so you can select crop images for analysis.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Agri-Connect uses your location to fetch accurate local weather data for your farm.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Agri-Connect uses your location to provide weather alerts and localised advisory.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Agri-Connect to access your photos to select crop images for disease analysis.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Agri-Connect to use your camera to photograph crops.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Agri-Connect to access your location for local weather data.
